question_text: The histogram below shows the distribution of daily wages for 40 workers. Read the modal class from the histogram.

answer_key.explanation: The modal class is the class with the highest frequency. From the histogram, 300–400 has frequency 15, the tallest bar.
common_mistakes: Confusing modal class with median class.

visual.caption: Histogram of daily wages (n = 40)
visual.altText: Histogram with five bars; the third bar from the left is the tallest and the leftmost and rightmost bars are the shortest of equal height.
